name: SOUNDHOUND AI, INC.
business: SoundHound is a global leader in conversational intelligence, offering independent Voice AI solutions that enable businesses to deliver high-quality conversational experiences to their customers. The company provides products like Smart Answering, Smart Ordering, Dynamic Interaction, and SoundHound Chat AI to product creators across automotive, TV, IoT, and customer service industries.

exposures.sentence: We are a global leader in conversational intelligence, offering independent Voice AI solutions that enable businesses to deliver high-quality conversational experiences to their customers.
SoundHound Chat AI, a powerful voice assistant with integrated Generative AI
We also offer edge, cloud and hybrid solutions.
SoundHound's voice AI delivers best-in-class speed and accuracy in numerous languages to product creators across automotive, TV, and IoT, and to customer service industries
SoundHound Smart Ordering offers an easy-to-understand voice assistant for restaurants that takes phone orders

catalysts.event: Earnout consideration settlement for met 2025 revenue target
catalysts.sentence: the 2025 revenue target was met and the related earnout consideration is expected to be settled in the first quarter of 2026.
